reference: WILFRID PIGEONCOTE HAD SUDDENLY BECOME HEIR TO HIS UNCLE SIR WILFRID PIGEONCOTE ON THE DEATH OF HIS COUSIN MAJOR WILFRID PIGEONCOTE WHO HAD SUCCUMBED TO THE AFTER EFFECTS OF A POLO ACCIDENT
text: Wilfred Pigeoncote had suddenly become heir to his uncle, Sir Wilfred Pigeoncote, on the death of his cousin, Major Wilfred Pigeoncote, who had succumbed to the after-effects of a polo accident.
